title: Omalotheca alpigena
taxonomy: Omalotheca alpigena is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Omalotheca and is native to Europe. The plant's classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the clade Angiosperms. Within the family Asteraceae, it is part of the clade Euasterids I. The species' classification is a key part of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
